name: slice / asset 87 (jurassic park 3)
description:
before i get hate for naming the spino slice, i went onto the jp wiki, and there it said it had the codename slice, so with that out of the way, continue reading

we know him, we love him, the jurassic park 3 spinosaurus, everyone's favourite t-rex killer, the king of isla sorna, i tried making it as accurate as i could while still accounting for the different interests of people, i made sure that it is good for people who like their dinos with speech, and people who like them without speech, in short you encounter him on isla sorna, you messed up his ambush on a triceratops, and he is pissed, you can change the scenario of you want thats fine by me, this is only my second bot so dont expect anything great, but thanks for checking it out anyways

i made sure to make it compatible for people who like talking dinos and people that dont

if you say ''speech allowed: no'' the bot wont speak ever

if you say ''speech allowed: yes'' the bot gets the option wether or not to speak and this will make him speak in some messages, and not speak in some messages

if you say ''speech allowed: absolutely'' the bot will speak from the first message forward

added music, idk why...turn it on if you fight with him or something idk
it goes hard, trust

pfp by BLSwiftThief on ArtStation

UPDATEEEEE, i just saw the bot hit 2k chats so i called upon all my remaining creativity to make it 1k tokens

update: added second scenario to create your own scenario, should make the bot cooperate better if you want a different scenario (i think). also refined the personality and deleted unnecessary info

another update: enabled proxy after FINALLY figuring out what it does
creator: idk something
